days.title: Arrival in Bali
days.subtitle: Settling into the tropical vibes

timeline.title: Arrive at Ngurah Rai International Airport
timeline.detail: Welcome to Bali! Collect your luggage and pass through customs. Be ready for some tropical heat and vibrant culture.
timeline.mapQuery: Ngurah Rai International Airport, Bali, Indonesia

timeline.title: Check in to The Haven Suites Bali Berawa
timeline.detail: Settle into your beachfront suite at this upscale hotel with stunning ocean views located in Berawa, Canggu.
timeline.mapQuery: The Haven Suites Bali Berawa, Bali, Indonesia

timeline.title: Lunch at Shady Shack
timeline.detail: Enjoy a delightful vegetarian meal at this charming spot in Canggu known for its comforting and healthy selections.

timeline.title: Explore Berawa Beach
timeline.detail: Relax on Berawa Beach, perfect for some sunbathing or taking a leisurely stroll by the ocean. Enjoy views of the sunset while sipping on fresh coconut water.

timeline.title: Dinner at La Brisa
timeline.detail: Savor delicious seafood while sitting on the beach at La Brisa. Famous for its rustic decor and relaxed ambiance.

timeline.title: Evening Stroll along the Beach
timeline.detail: Take a long, relaxed walk along the beach to soak in the sounds of the ocean and the twinkling stars over the Bali sky.

localTips: Use Grab for affordable transport around Bali.
Try to learn a few basic Bahasa Indonesia phrases to enhance your local interactions.
Don't forget to apply sunscreen throughout the day.

days.title: Cultural Day in Ubud
days.subtitle: Exploring Balinese culture and nature

timeline.title: Breakfast at Hotel
timeline.detail: Enjoy a delicious buffet breakfast with various local and international dishes before starting your day in Ubud.
timeline.mapQuery: The Haven Suites Bali Berawa, Bali, Indonesia

timeline.title: Drive to Ubud Monkey Forest
timeline.detail: Take a short drive to Ubud's famous Monkey Forest, a natural habitat for playful long-tailed macaques.

timeline.title: Visit Ubud Monkey Forest
timeline.detail: Walk through the lush greenery of the forest while observing the monkeys. Remember to keep your belongings secure from curious monkeys.

timeline.title: Lunch at Cafe Organic
timeline.detail: Delight in healthy and vibrant meals at this cafe that focuses on organic ingredients and impressive smoothie bowls.

timeline.title: Visit Tegalalang Rice Terraces
timeline.detail: Discover the stunning Tegalalang Rice Terraces, showcasing exquisite Balinese rice cultivation amidst breathtaking landscapes.

timeline.title: Balinese Cooking Class
timeline.detail: Join a cooking class where you learn how to prepare traditional Balinese dishes with local ingredients. A delightful interactive experience!

timeline.title: Dinner at Locavore
timeline.detail: Experience award-winning Indonesian cuisine in an artistic set-up, perfect for fine dining enthusiasts. Reservations are required!

localTips: Book activities in advance, especially cooking classes and dinner reservations.
Be early to avoid crowds at Ubud Monkey Forest.
Carry some cash for small vendors in Ubud.

days.title: Relax and Departure
days.subtitle: Chill out before leaving Bali

timeline.title: Breakfast at The Haven
timeline.detail: Enjoy a leisurely breakfast at your hotel, basking in the last morning sun before departure.
timeline.mapQuery: The Haven Suites Bali Berawa, Bali, Indonesia

timeline.title: Last Swim at Berawa Beach
timeline.detail: Take a final dip in the ocean at Berawa Beach. Enjoy the waves and warm ocean breeze before heading to the airport.

timeline.title: Check Out from Hotel
timeline.detail: Pack your bags and check out from the hotel. Ensure you have all personal belongings before heading out.
timeline.mapQuery: The Haven Suites Bali Berawa, Bali, Indonesia

timeline.title: Lunch at The Cashew Tree
timeline.detail: Savor a delicious healthy lunch at The Cashew Tree, known for its fresh ingredients and vibrant flavors.

timeline.title: Transport to Ngurah Rai International Airport
timeline.detail: Head back to the airport in a pre-arranged car, leaving you plenty of time for security and check-in.
timeline.mapQuery: Ngurah Rai International Airport, Bali, Indonesia

timeline.title: Departure from Bali
timeline.detail: Say goodbye to Bali as you check in for your flight back home. Carry lovely memories with you.
timeline.mapQuery: Ngurah Rai International Airport, Bali, Indonesia

localTips: Confirm your flight timings and check-in info at the airport a day before.
Take some Balinese coffee home as a souvenir.
Arrive at the airport at least 2 hours before your flight.

hotels.name: The Haven Suites Bali Berawa
hotels.note: Luxurious beachfront suites in Canggu, steps from Berawa Beach.
hotels.address: Jalan Raya Berawa No. 63, Canggu, Bali, Indonesia

budget.note: Staying at The Haven Suites Bali Berawa.
Estimated spending on food for two travelers.
Transportation cost for day trips to Ubud.

urgent.label: Sign up for a Balinese Cooking Class
